历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 10803 → 10085 → 15495 → 8126 → 7839. An abnormal gap occurred in 2023 (15495). 专业热度与地域.text: Among the science majors offered, Data Science and Big Data Technology (computer category) has high social popularity, while Rehabilitation Physical Therapy (medical technology category) has stable popularity. 预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings (intensified competition), the large expansion of 167% in the 2026 plan (easing competition), the 32% increase in provincial examinees (intensifying competition), and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee growth rate, so overall competition pressure is significantly relieved.
